'''Amarin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of dense forests in the [[Amarin system/Legends|Amarin system]] of the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]], and one of the busiest [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworlds]] of the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]].

==History==
Discovered circa [[25,127 BBY]], Amarin was a member-world of the [[Kingdom of Cron]] up until it was absorbed into the [[Xim's empire|empire]] of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]]. Amarin became a hunting reserve for Xim's empire. Following the collapse of the empire in [[25,096 BBY]], the Cron Kingdom reasserted its control over the area and remained an independent state. Several millennia later, the planet was enveloped in [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan's]] [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith empire]] until its fall in [[3960 BBY]]. Remaining separate from the Republic, the world joined the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]; the world was seized from the Sith after their defeat several years before the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]].<ref name="TEA" />

A member state of the Republic for several centuries, the world joined the rest of the sector in becoming member states of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. While several battles were fought in the sector, the planet was seized following the end of the war by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Seeing the area as a threat, the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] divided the area in to three sectors, with Amarin being divided into the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]].<ref name="TEA" /> Patrolled by the [[Warlord (Victory II-class)|''Warlord'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the system joined in [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Thrawn campaign|confederacy]] only to be placed under the control of Sector [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Gronn]] upon Thrawn's death.<ref name="MTL" />

Forming an independent government from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] the Allied Tion, of which Amarin was still a member, avoided the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] altogether.<ref name="Pirates & Privateers">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref><ref name="Dark Empire Sourcebook">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> As of [[137 ABY]], Amarin was a member of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />
